next_steps: Perform serum and urine immunofixation electrophoresis and serum free light-chain assay
Order technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) or similar bone-avid radionuclide scintigraphy
Conduct cardiac magnetic resonance imaging with T1 mapping and extracellular volume (ECV) quantification
Perform N-terminal pro-B-type natriuretic peptide (NT-proBNP) and high-sensitivity troponin T testing
Consider endomyocardial biopsy if biochemical and non-invasive imaging testing remains inconclusive
Refer to ophthalmology for evaluation for Fabry disease or rheumatology for systemic involvement
